## Claim being challenged

Paste the exact claim ID or quote.

## Your correction

Explain what is wrong.

## Evidence

Provide links, transaction hashes, contract addresses, command output, screenshots, or reproducible scripts.

## Reproduction steps

List exact commands or steps.

## Expected result

What should a reviewer see?

## Notes

No insults. Evidence only.
